# SmartCAMPOST — Complete Workflow Map

**Generated by static analysis of backend (Spring Boot), frontend web (React 19), and Flutter mobile.**
**Admin entry point:** admin@smartcampost.cm / Admin@SmartCAMPOST2026

---

## Business Rules (Always Enforced)

1. **CLIENT** can self-register via `/auth/register` — no admin required
2. **AGENT, COURIER, STAFF, ADMIN, FINANCE, RISK** — ALL created only by ADMIN
3. ADMIN account bootstrapped on startup via `DefaultAdminBootstrap`
4. JWT: 8-hour TTL, HS256, claims: sub/phone/role/entityId/email
5. Account freeze: ADMIN and RISK can freeze; frozen user's JWT still works for ≤8h (known risk)
6. Parcel lock: AGENT locks parcel after validation; only ADMIN can override after lock

---

## System Entry Points

| Entry | Actor | URL / Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| Admin bootstrap | SYSTEM | Startup → creates ADMIN account from env vars |
| Client self-registration | PUBLIC | `/auth/register` |
| Login (all roles) | ALL | `/auth/login` |
| OTP login | ALL | `/auth/login-otp` |
| Google OAuth login | ALL | `/auth/login` (Google button) |
| Password reset | ALL | `/auth/reset-password` |
| Public parcel tracking | PUBLIC | `/tracking` |

---

## ROLE: CLIENT

### Creation
- **Self-registration** at `/auth/register` — phone + OTP verification required
- Google OAuth on `/auth/register` page

### Dashboard Route
`/client` → `ClientDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| View dashboard stats | `/client` | `GET /api/dashboard/summary` |
| List my parcels | `/client/parcels` | `GET /api/parcels/me` |
| Create new parcel | `/client/parcels/create` | `POST /api/parcels` |
| View parcel detail | `/client/parcels/:id` | `GET /api/parcels/{id}` |
| View parcel QR code | `/client/parcels/:id/qr` | `GET /api/parcels/{id}/qr` |
| Print shipping label | `/client/parcels/:id/print-label` | client-side PDF |
| Track parcel | `/client/tracking` | `GET /api/track/{ref}` |
| View pickups | `/client/pickups` | `GET /api/pickups/me` |
| View payments | `/client/payments` | `GET /api/payments` |
| Notifications | `/client/notifications` | `GET /api/notifications/me` |
| Support tickets | `/client/support` | `GET /api/support` |
| Map view | `/client/map` | — |

### Allowed Actions
- Create parcel (POST)
- View own parcels only (data isolation enforced by backend)
- Track any parcel by reference (public)
- Request pickup
- View own payments
- Request refund
- Manage own addresses (GET/POST `PUT /api/addresses`)
- Mark notifications as read
- Create support ticket
- Update profile (`PUT /api/clients/me`)
- Change preferred language (`PATCH /api/clients/me/preferred-language`)
- View own invoices (`GET /api/invoices/me`)

### Forbidden Actions
- Access `/admin`, `/staff`, `/finance`, `/risk`, `/agent`, `/courier` routes
- View other clients' parcels
- Create staff/agent/courier accounts
- Freeze user accounts
- Override locked parcels
- View all payments (only own)
- Approve refunds

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Parcel | ✅ | Own only | Partial (pre-lock) | ❌ |
| Address | ✅ | Own only | ✅ | ❌ |
| Pickup request | ✅ | Own only | ❌ | ❌ |
| Support ticket | ✅ | Own only | ❌ | ❌ |
| Notification | ❌ | Own only | Read only | ❌ |
| Profile | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Registration → Login → Create Parcel
```
1. Navigate to /auth/register
2. Select language (FR/EN)
3. Fill: fullName, phone, email (optional), password
4. Click "Send OTP" → POST /api/auth/send-otp
5. Receive OTP via SMS (test: 000000)
6. Enter OTP in field
7. Submit → POST /api/auth/register
8. Redirect to /auth/login
9. Fill: phoneOrEmail, password
10. Submit → POST /api/auth/login → JWT received
11. Redirect to /client
12. Click "Create Parcel" → /client/parcels/create
13. Step 1 (Addresses): select/create sender address, select/create recipient address
14. Step 2 (Details): enter weight, dimensions, declared value, fragile toggle, description
15. Step 3 (Service): select STANDARD/EXPRESS, select AGENCY/HOME delivery
16. Step 4 (Payment): select PREPAID/COD
17. Submit → POST /api/parcels
18. Redirect to /client/parcels (parcel list)
```

#### Journey 2: Track a Parcel
```
1. Navigate to /tracking (public) or /client/tracking (authenticated)
2. Enter tracking reference in input
3. Click search
4. View status timeline, current location on map
5. View scan event history
```

#### Journey 3: Google OAuth Login
```
1. Navigate to /auth/login
2. Click Google button
3. Google OAuth popup → credentials callback
4. POST /api/auth/google with credential token
5. Backend verifies with GoogleIdTokenVerifier
6. JWT returned → stored in Zustand/localStorage
7. Redirect to /client
```

#### Journey 4: OTP Login
```
1. Navigate to /auth/login-otp
2. Enter phone number
3. Click "Send OTP" → POST /api/auth/login/otp/request
4. Receive SMS (test: 000000)
5. Enter OTP
6. Submit → POST /api/auth/login/otp/confirm
7. JWT returned → redirect to /client
```

#### Journey 5: Password Reset
```
1. Navigate to /auth/reset-password
2. Enter phone number
3. Click "Send OTP" → POST /api/auth/password/reset/request
4. Enter OTP + new password
5. Submit → POST /api/auth/password/reset/confirm
6. Redirect to /auth/login
```

### Form Flows
| Form | Fields | Validation | API |
|---|---|---|---|
| Register | fullName, phone, otp, email (opt), password | phone: /^\+?[0-9]{8,15}$/, password: 8+ chars + uppercase + lowercase + digit | POST /api/auth/register |
| Login | phoneOrEmail, password | required | POST /api/auth/login |
| Create Parcel | senderAddressId, recipientAddressId, weight, dimensions, declaredValue, isFragile, serviceType, deliveryOption, paymentOption, description | weight > 0, addresses required | POST /api/parcels |
| Create Address | label, street (opt), city, region, country | label+city+region required | POST /api/addresses |

---

## ROLE: AGENT

### Creation
- **ADMIN only** via `/admin/users/agents` → `AgentManagement` page
- POST `/api/agents` — requires ADMIN role

### Dashboard Route
`/agent` → `AgentDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| View dashboard / task list | `/agent` | `GET /api/dashboard/summary` |
| QR scan console | `/agent/scan` | `POST /api/scan-events` |
| Map view | `/agent/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/agent/notifications` | `GET /api/notifications/me` |
| Validate & lock parcel | Scan console | `POST /api/parcels/{id}/validate-and-lock` |
| Create scan events | Scan console | `POST /api/scan-events` |
| Check parcel correctability | — | `GET /api/parcels/{id}/can-correct` |
| Correct parcel (pre-lock) | — | `PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/correct` |
| Accept parcel | — | `PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/accept` |

### Allowed Actions
- Scan QR codes and create scan events with GPS
- View parcel details (by ID or QR)
- Validate parcel (verify weight/dimensions match)
- Lock parcel after validation (prevents client corrections)
- Correct parcel data before locking
- View task assignments
- Create delivery scan events
- View agency's parcels (scope-limited to their agency)

### Forbidden Actions
- Create parcels (CLIENT only)
- Create other user accounts
- Access financial data
- Freeze user accounts
- Access `/admin`, `/client`, `/finance`, `/risk` routes
- Override locked parcels (ADMIN only)

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Scan Event | ✅ | Agency scope | ❌ | ❌ |
| Parcel | ❌ | ✅ | Validate/Lock only | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Agency Parcel Intake (QR Scan → Validate → Lock)
```
1. Login → redirect to /agent
2. Navigate to /agent/scan
3. Scan QR code on parcel
4. Backend resolves parcel by QR code
5. GPS location captured automatically
6. POST /api/scan-events → event type: RECEIVED_AT_AGENCY
7. Review parcel details (weight, dimensions)
8. Click "Validate" → verify physical weight matches
9. Click "Lock" → POST /api/parcels/{id}/validate-and-lock
10. Final QR code generated by backend
11. Print final QR on parcel label
```

#### Journey 2: Multi-Parcel Batch Intake
```
1. Navigate to /agent/scan
2. Scan first parcel QR → added to intake list
3. Scan second parcel QR → appended to list
4. Each scan: POST /api/scan-events with GPS
5. Review batch → validate each parcel
6. Lock each validated parcel
```

#### Journey 3: In-Transit Scan
```
1. At transit hub, open /agent/scan
2. Scan parcel QR
3. GPS captured
4. POST /api/scan-events → event type: IN_TRANSIT
5. Parcel status updated in real-time (SSE feed to admin)
```

---

## ROLE: COURIER

### Creation
- **ADMIN only** via `/admin/users/couriers` → `CourierManagement` page
- POST `/api/couriers` — requires ADMIN role

### Dashboard Route
`/courier` → `CourierDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| View dashboard (pickups/deliveries stats) | `/courier` | `GET /api/dashboard/summary` |
| View assigned pickups | `/courier/pickups` | `GET /api/pickups/courier/me` |
| Pickup detail | `/courier/pickups/:id` | `GET /api/pickups/{id}` |
| View assigned deliveries | `/courier/deliveries` | `GET /api/deliveries` |
| Delivery detail | `/courier/deliveries/:id` | `GET /api/delivery/{id}/status` |
| Confirm delivery (OTP flow) | `/courier/deliveries/confirm` | delivery workflow |
| QR scan | `/courier/scan` | `POST /api/scan-events` |
| Map view | `/courier/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/courier/notifications` | — |

### Allowed Actions
- View assigned pickups (scope: courier/me)
- Confirm pickup via QR scan
- Start delivery
- Send delivery OTP to recipient (`POST /api/delivery/otp/send`)
- Verify delivery OTP (`POST /api/delivery/otp/verify`)
- Complete delivery (`POST /api/delivery/complete`)
- Report delivery failure (`POST /api/delivery/{id}/failed`)
- Reschedule delivery
- Create scan events (GPS mandatory)
- View delivery status

### Forbidden Actions
- Create parcels
- Access admin routes
- View financial data
- Freeze accounts
- Lock/unlock parcels
- View other couriers' assignments

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Scan Event | ✅ | Own scope | ❌ | ❌ |
| Pickup | ❌ | Assigned only | Status update | ❌ |
| Delivery | ❌ | Assigned only | Status update | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Pickup Confirmation
```
1. Login → /courier
2. Navigate to /courier/pickups
3. Select assigned pickup
4. View pickup detail → /courier/pickups/:id
5. Scan QR on parcel or enter tracking ref
6. POST /api/pickups/{id}/confirm
7. Create scan event → POST /api/scan-events (PICKED_UP)
8. Navigate back to pickup list
```

#### Journey 2: Home Delivery with OTP
```
1. Navigate to /courier/deliveries
2. Select assigned delivery
3. View detail → /courier/deliveries/:id
4. Click "Start Delivery" → POST /api/delivery/start
5. Navigate to /courier/deliveries/confirm
6. Enter recipient phone number
7. Click "Send OTP" → POST /api/delivery/otp/send
8. Recipient receives SMS with 6-digit OTP
9. Enter OTP code in input field
10. Click "Verify" → POST /api/delivery/otp/verify
11. Upload photo proof (image_picker — WEB only, mobile TODO)
12. Click "Complete Delivery" → POST /api/delivery/complete
13. Parcel status → DELIVERED
14. Navigation returns to delivery list
```

#### Journey 3: Delivery Failure
```
1. After attempting delivery → recipient not available
2. POST /api/delivery/{id}/failed with reason
3. Optional: POST /api/delivery/{id}/reschedule
4. Parcel status → OUT_FOR_DELIVERY (or RETURNED depending on config)
```

---

## ROLE: STAFF

### Creation
- **ADMIN only** via `/admin/users/staff` → `StaffManagement` page
- POST `/api/staff` — requires ADMIN role

### Dashboard Route
`/staff` → `StaffDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| View staff list | `/staff` | `GET /api/staff` |
| Parcel management | `/staff/parcels` | `GET /api/parcels` (all) |
| Parcel detail | `/staff/parcels/:id` | `GET /api/parcels/{id}` |
| Pickups management | `/staff/pickups` | `GET /api/pickups` |
| Assign courier to pickup | `/staff/pickups` | `POST /api/pickups/{id}/assign-courier` |
| QR scan | `/staff/scan` | `POST /api/scan-events` |
| Tracking | `/staff/tracking` | `GET /api/track/{ref}` |
| Analytics | `/staff/analytics` | `GET /api/analytics/*` |
| Map | `/staff/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/staff/notifications` | — |

### Allowed Actions
- View ALL parcels (no client-scope isolation for staff)
- Assign couriers to pickups
- Create scan events
- Track any parcel
- View analytics dashboards
- Accept/validate parcels (`PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/accept`)
- Correct parcel data (pre-lock)
- View all pickups
- View analytics

### Forbidden Actions
- Create user accounts (ADMIN only)
- Access `/admin` routes (separate permission)
- Freeze user accounts
- Override locked parcels
- Access financial data (FINANCE role required)
- Access risk management

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Parcel | ❌ | ALL | Status/accept/correct | ❌ |
| Pickup | ❌ | ALL | Assign courier | ❌ |
| Scan Event | ✅ | ALL | ❌ | ❌ |

---

## ROLE: ADMIN

### Creation
- **SYSTEM BOOTSTRAP** — `DefaultAdminBootstrap` creates on startup from env vars
- Credentials: `admin@smartcampost.cm` / `Admin@SmartCAMPOST2026` (configured in `.env`)

### Dashboard Route
`/admin` → `AdminDashboard` (with live SSE scan feed)

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| Live admin dashboard (SSE) | `/admin` | `GET /api/scan-events/stream` (SSE) |
| All parcel management | `/admin/parcels` | `GET /api/parcels` (all) |
| Parcel detail + override | `/admin/parcels/:id` | `PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/admin-override` |
| Staff management | `/admin/users/staff` | `POST /api/staff` |
| Client management | `/admin/users/clients` | `GET /api/clients` |
| Agent management | `/admin/users/agents` | `POST /api/agents` |
| Agency management | `/admin/users/agencies` | CRUD /api/agencies |
| Courier management | `/admin/users/couriers` | `POST /api/couriers` |
| Tariff management | `/admin/tariffs` | CRUD /api/tariffs |
| Integration management | `/admin/integrations` | CRUD /api/integrations |
| User account management | `/admin/accounts` | `PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze` |
| Finance dashboard | `/admin/finance` | `GET /api/finance/stats` |
| Create finance user | `/admin/finance/create` | `POST /api/staff` (role=FINANCE) |
| Risk dashboard | `/admin/risk` | `GET /api/risk/alerts` |
| Create risk user | `/admin/risk/create` | `POST /api/staff` (role=RISK) |
| Self-healing dashboard | `/admin/self-healing` | `GET /api/ai/agent/status` |
| Tracking | `/admin/tracking` | `GET /api/track/{ref}` |
| Analytics | `/admin/analytics` | `GET /api/analytics/*` |
| QR scan | `/admin/scan` | `POST /api/scan-events` |
| Map | `/admin/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/admin/notifications` | — |
| API Coverage (debug) | `/admin/api-coverage` | client-side only |

### Allowed Actions (ALL privileged operations)

#### User Management
- Create STAFF accounts (role: STAFF/FINANCE/RISK)
- Create AGENT accounts
- Create COURIER accounts
- List all clients (GET /api/clients)
- List all staff (GET /api/staff)
- List all agents (GET /api/agents)
- List all couriers (GET /api/couriers)
- Freeze/unfreeze any user account (PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze)
- Filter users by role (GET /api/admin/users/by-role?role=)

#### Parcel Management
- View all parcels (no scope restriction)
- Override locked parcels (PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/admin-override)
- Validate and lock parcels
- Change delivery option on any parcel

#### Agency Management
- Create, update, deactivate agencies
- Assign agents to agencies

#### System Management
- Manage tariffs (create/update/delete price brackets)
- Manage integrations (payment/SMS/maps/analytics providers)
- Configure API keys and base URLs for integrations

#### Risk and Finance
- View finance stats and refunds
- View and resolve risk alerts
- Freeze users flagged by RISK

### Forbidden Actions
- None for ADMIN — full system access

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| UserAccount (staff/agent/courier) | ✅ | ALL | Freeze/role | ❌ |
| Client | ❌ | ALL | ❌ | ❌ |
| Agency | ✅ | ALL | ✅ | ✅ |
| Parcel | ❌ | ALL | Override | ❌ |
| Tariff | ✅ | ALL | ✅ | ✅ |
| Integration | ✅ | ALL | ✅ | ✅ |
| Risk Alert | ✅ | ALL | ✅ | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Create Internal Account (Staff/Finance/Risk)
```
1. Login as ADMIN → /admin
2. Navigate to /admin/users/staff (for STAFF)
   or /admin/finance/create (for FINANCE)
   or /admin/risk/create (for RISK)
3. Click "Create" button
4. Fill form: fullName, phone, email, password, role selector
5. Submit → POST /api/staff
6. New user appears in staff list
7. New user can now login at /auth/login
```

#### Journey 2: Create Agent Account
```
1. Navigate to /admin/users/agents
2. Click "Create Agent"
3. Fill: fullName, phone, email, password
4. Select agency assignment
5. Submit → POST /api/agents
6. Agent listed under agency
```

#### Journey 3: Create Courier Account
```
1. Navigate to /admin/users/couriers
2. Click "Create Courier"
3. Fill: fullName, phone, email, password, vehicle identifier
4. Submit → POST /api/couriers
5. Courier visible in courier list
```

#### Journey 4: Freeze User Account
```
1. Navigate to /admin/accounts
2. Search for user by name/phone/email
3. Locate user in table
4. Click "Freeze" button
5. Enter reason for freeze
6. Confirm → PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze with frozen=true
7. User's badge shows "FROZEN"
8. User's subsequent login attempts blocked
```

#### Journey 5: Override Locked Parcel
```
1. Navigate to /admin/parcels
2. Search for locked parcel
3. View parcel detail
4. Click "Admin Override"
5. Enter reason/justification
6. Submit → PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/admin-override
7. Parcel unlocked — audit log entry created
8. Agent can re-validate and re-lock
```

#### Journey 6: Manage Tariffs
```
1. Navigate to /admin/tariffs
2. View tariff list (filter by service type)
3. Click "Create Tariff"
4. Fill: service type, zone origin, zone destination, min weight, max weight, price
5. Submit → POST /api/tariffs
6. Tariff active — affects future parcel pricing
7. Edit existing: click edit → update price → PATCH /api/tariffs/{id}
8. Delete: click delete → confirm → DELETE /api/tariffs/{id}
```

#### Journey 7: Monitor Self-Healing Dashboard
```
1. Navigate to /admin/self-healing
2. View AI agent status
3. View congestion alerts
4. Review AI recommendations
5. Approve/reject recommended actions
6. Dashboard auto-refreshes every 30 seconds
```

### Form Flows
| Form | Fields | Validation | API |
|---|---|---|---|
| Create Staff | fullName, phone, email, password, role (STAFF/FINANCE/RISK/ADMIN) | All required | POST /api/staff |
| Create Agent | fullName, phone, email, password, agencyId | All required | POST /api/agents |
| Create Courier | fullName, phone, email, password, vehicleIdentifier | All required | POST /api/couriers |
| Create Agency | name, city, region, address, lat, lng | name+city required | POST /api/agencies |
| Create Tariff | serviceType, originZone, destinationZone, minWeight, maxWeight, pricePerKg, basePrice | All required | POST /api/tariffs |
| Create Integration | configType, providerName, baseUrl, apiKey | configType required | POST /api/integrations |
| Freeze User | userId, reason | reason required | PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze |

---

## ROLE: FINANCE

### Creation
- **ADMIN only** via `/admin/finance/create` → `CreateFinancePage`
- POST `/api/staff` with role=FINANCE

### Dashboard Route
`/finance` → `FinanceDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| Finance stats | `/finance` | `GET /api/finance/stats` |
| Payment list | `/finance/payments` | `GET /api/payments` |
| Refund management | `/finance/refunds` | `GET /api/finance/refunds` |
| Analytics | `/finance/analytics` | `GET /api/analytics/*` |
| Map | `/finance/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/finance/notifications` | — |

### Allowed Actions
- View all payment transactions
- View financial statistics (total revenue, pending, completed, failed)
- Approve or reject refund requests
- Export data (CSV/XLSX/PDF via client-side)
- View revenue analytics charts

### Forbidden Actions
- Create user accounts
- Modify parcels
- Access parcel management
- Freeze user accounts (RISK role)
- Override locked parcels

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Payment | ❌ | ALL | ❌ | ❌ |
| Refund | ❌ | ALL | Approve/Reject | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Approve Refund
```
1. Login as FINANCE → /finance
2. Navigate to /finance/refunds
3. View pending refund list
4. Click refund to review details
5. Click "Approve" or "Reject"
6. PATCH /api/finance/refunds/{id}/status → status: APPROVED or REJECTED
7. Refund status updated
8. Client notification triggered
```

#### Journey 2: View Payment Analytics
```
1. Navigate to /finance/analytics
2. View revenue charts (Recharts: LineChart, BarChart, PieChart)
3. Filter by date range
4. Export report → CSV/XLSX/PDF (client-side jsPDF/XLSX)
```

---

## ROLE: RISK

### Creation
- **ADMIN only** via `/admin/risk/create` → `CreateRiskPage`
- POST `/api/staff` with role=RISK

### Dashboard Route
`/risk` → `RiskDashboard`

### Available Functionalities
| Functionality | Route | API |
|---|---|---|
| Risk dashboard | `/risk` | `GET /api/risk/alerts` |
| Risk alerts list | `/risk/alerts` | `GET /api/risk/alerts` |
| Compliance reports | `/risk/compliance` | `GET /api/compliance/*` |
| Analytics | `/risk/analytics` | — |
| Map | `/risk/map` | — |
| Notifications | `/risk/notifications` | — |

### Allowed Actions
- View all risk alerts (with severity: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL)
- Update alert status (PATCH /api/risk/alerts/{id})
- Create new risk alert (POST /api/risk)
- Freeze user accounts flagged by AI (PATCH /api/risk/users/{id}/freeze)
- View compliance reports
- View suspicious activity reports
- View AI-detected anomalies

### Forbidden Actions
- Create user accounts
- Modify parcel data
- Access financial data (FINANCE role)
- Override locked parcels

### CRUD Operations
| Entity | C | R | U | D |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Risk Alert | ✅ | ALL | Status update | ❌ |
| UserAccount (freeze) | ❌ | ALL | Freeze only | ❌ |

### Complete User Journeys

#### Journey 1: Investigate and Resolve Risk Alert
```
1. Login as RISK → /risk
2. View dashboard: active alerts, suspicious activities, critical incidents
3. Navigate to /risk/alerts
4. Filter by severity (CRITICAL first)
5. Click alert to view details
6. Review flagged activity (GPS anomaly, payment anomaly, etc.)
7. Choose action:
   a. Freeze user → PATCH /api/risk/users/{userId}/freeze
   b. Mark as resolved → PATCH /api/risk/alerts/{id} status=RESOLVED
   c. Escalate → mark as ESCALATED
8. Alert status updated in real-time
```

#### Journey 2: Create Manual Risk Alert
```
1. Navigate to /risk/alerts
2. Click "Create Alert"
3. Fill: type, severity, description, target user/parcel
4. POST /api/risk → alert created
5. Alert visible in admin risk dashboard
```

---

## Cross-Role Workflow Catalog

### WF-01: Client Self-Registration

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | PUBLIC — `/auth/register` |
| **Required Permissions** | None (public endpoint) |
| **Involved Pages** | `/auth/register`, `/auth/login` |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/auth/send-otp`, `POST /api/auth/register` |
| **Expected Result** | User account created with role=CLIENT; redirect to login |
| **Failure States** | Phone already exists (PHONE_ALREADY_EXISTS), OTP expired (OTP_EXPIRED), OTP already used (OTP_ALREADY_USED), invalid phone format, password too weak |
| **Security Validations** | OTP single-use, rate-limited (10 auth requests/min per IP), password: 8+ chars + upper + lower + digit |

---

### WF-02: Phone + Password Login

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ALL roles — `/auth/login` |
| **Required Permissions** | None (public endpoint) |
| **Involved Pages** | `/auth/login`, role dashboard |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/auth/login` |
| **Expected Result** | JWT stored in localStorage; redirect to role-specific dashboard |
| **Failure States** | INVALID_CREDENTIALS (401), ACCOUNT_LOCKED after 5 failures (423), ACCOUNT_FROZEN (403) |
| **Security Validations** | Rate limiting: 10 auth requests/min; lockout: 5 failures → 15 min lockout; frozen account blocked |

---

### WF-03: OTP Login

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ALL roles — `/auth/login-otp` |
| **Required Permissions** | None (public endpoint) |
| **Involved Pages** | `/auth/login-otp` |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/auth/login/otp/request`, `POST /api/auth/login/otp/confirm` |
| **Expected Result** | JWT returned; redirect to role dashboard |
| **Failure States** | OTP_EXPIRED, OTP_ALREADY_USED, phone not found, rate limit exceeded |
| **Security Validations** | OTP: 6-digit, atomic single-use, purpose-scoped (LOGIN), TTL-bound |

---

### WF-04: Google OAuth Login

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ALL roles — `/auth/login` (Google button) |
| **Required Permissions** | None (public endpoint) |
| **Involved Pages** | `/auth/login` |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/auth/google` |
| **Expected Result** | New CLIENT account created (first-time) OR existing account JWT returned; redirect to role dashboard |
| **Failure States** | Invalid Google token, GOOGLE_EMAIL_TAKEN (email already used by non-Google account), rate limit |
| **Security Validations** | GoogleIdTokenVerifier validates audience = configured Google Client ID |

---

### WF-05: Admin Creates Internal Account (STAFF/FINANCE/RISK/AGENT/COURIER)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ADMIN — `/admin/users/staff`, `/admin/finance/create`, `/admin/risk/create`, `/admin/users/agents`, `/admin/users/couriers` |
| **Required Permissions** | `ADMIN` role only; `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')")` on all creation endpoints |
| **Involved Pages** | StaffManagement, CreateFinancePage, CreateRiskPage, AgentManagement, CourierManagement |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/staff`, `POST /api/agents`, `POST /api/couriers` |
| **Expected Result** | New user account created; appears in management list; can log in with provided credentials |
| **Failure States** | PHONE_ALREADY_EXISTS, EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS, unauthorized (403 if not ADMIN), missing fields |
| **Security Validations** | Only ADMIN can POST to /api/staff, /api/agents, /api/couriers; role injection impossible (backend hardcodes allowed roles) |

---

### WF-06: Parcel Creation (Client)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | CLIENT — `/client/parcels/create` |
| **Required Permissions** | `CLIENT` role; `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('CLIENT')")` |
| **Involved Pages** | `CreateParcel` (4-step form) |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/addresses` (load addresses), `POST /api/addresses` (create address), `GET /api/tariffs/quote` (pricing), `POST /api/parcels` |
| **Expected Result** | Parcel created (status=CREATED), partial QR generated (HMAC-signed), redirect to parcel list |
| **Failure States** | No addresses selected, weight missing/invalid, backend validation fails, GPS unavailable |
| **Security Validations** | Only CLIENT can create parcels; addresses belong to authenticated client; price calculated server-side |

---

### WF-07: Agency Intake (Agent Scans + Validates + Locks)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | AGENT — `/agent/scan` |
| **Required Permissions** | `AGENT/COURIER/STAFF/ADMIN` for scan events; `AGENT/COURIER/STAFF/ADMIN` for validate-and-lock |
| **Involved Pages** | `ScanConsole` |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/scan-events` (GPS mandatory), `GET /api/parcels/{id}` (parcel lookup), `GET /api/parcels/{id}/can-correct`, `POST /api/parcels/{id}/validate-and-lock` |
| **Expected Result** | Parcel validated; final QR generated; parcel locked (client can no longer correct it) |
| **Failure States** | GPS unavailable (scan blocked), PARCEL_ALREADY_LOCKED, parcel not found, agent not at correct agency |
| **Security Validations** | GPS coordinates NOT NULL enforced; scan event GPS bounds check (Cameroon: lat 1.6–13.1, lon 8.5–16.2) |

---

### WF-08: Home Delivery with OTP (Courier)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | COURIER — `/courier/deliveries` |
| **Required Permissions** | Authenticated; `COURIER/AGENT/STAFF/ADMIN` for scan events and delivery endpoints |
| **Involved Pages** | `CourierDeliveries`, `DeliveryDetail`, `ConfirmDelivery` |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/pickups/courier/me`, `POST /api/delivery/start`, `POST /api/delivery/otp/send`, `POST /api/delivery/otp/verify`, `POST /api/delivery/complete` |
| **Expected Result** | Parcel status → DELIVERED; delivery proof recorded; invoice generated |
| **Failure States** | OTP_EXPIRED (courier must resend), OTP_ALREADY_USED, GPS failure, OTP_MAX_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED |
| **Security Validations** | OTP single-use, TTL-bound; delivery GPS recorded; recipient phone verified |

---

### WF-09: Payment Flow (PREPAID — MTN MoMo)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | CLIENT — `/client/payments` |
| **Required Permissions** | Authenticated |
| **Involved Pages** | `ClientPayments`, `MoMoPaymentPage` |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/payments/init`, `POST /api/payments/mtn/**` (webhook), `GET /api/payments/{id}` (status poll) |
| **Expected Result** | Payment status → SUCCESS; invoice generated (PDF via PDFBox) |
| **Failure States** | PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED, MTN payment timeout, webhook signature invalid, payment already exists |
| **Security Validations** | MTN webhook must be verified (known gap: no signature check currently); payment status polled |

---

### WF-10: Risk Alert → Freeze User Account

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | RISK — `/risk/alerts` |
| **Required Permissions** | `ADMIN` or `RISK` role; `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN') or hasRole('RISK')")` |
| **Involved Pages** | `RiskAlerts`, `UserAccountManagement` |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/risk/alerts`, `PATCH /api/risk/users/{id}/freeze`, `PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze` |
| **Expected Result** | User account frozen; subsequent API calls return 403 (after JWT expiry — 8h window) |
| **Failure States** | User not found, already frozen, unauthorized |
| **Security Validations** | Only RISK or ADMIN can freeze; frozen flag checked on login; JWT-based gap: existing tokens work for ≤8h |

---

### WF-11: Finance Refund Approval

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | FINANCE — `/finance/refunds` |
| **Required Permissions** | `ADMIN` or `FINANCE`; `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN') or hasRole('FINANCE')")` |
| **Involved Pages** | `Refunds` |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/finance/refunds`, `PATCH /api/finance/refunds/{id}/status` |
| **Expected Result** | Refund status → APPROVED or REJECTED; client notified |
| **Failure States** | Refund not found, already processed, unauthorized |
| **Security Validations** | Only FINANCE or ADMIN can update refund status |

---

### WF-12: Admin Override on Locked Parcel

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ADMIN — `/admin/parcels/:id` |
| **Required Permissions** | `ADMIN` only; `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')")` |
| **Involved Pages** | `ParcelDetail` (admin view) |
| **Involved APIs** | `PATCH /api/parcels/{id}/admin-override` |
| **Expected Result** | Parcel unlocked; audit log entry created; agent can re-validate |
| **Failure States** | Parcel not found, unauthorized (403 for non-ADMIN), reason missing |
| **Security Validations** | Strict ADMIN-only; full audit trail in AuditLog table |

---

### WF-13: Public Parcel Tracking

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | PUBLIC — `/tracking` |
| **Required Permissions** | None (public endpoint); `GET /api/track/{ref}` is PUBLIC |
| **Involved Pages** | `TrackingPage`, `ParcelTrackingPage` |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/track/{ref}` |
| **Expected Result** | Parcel status, last scan event, timeline displayed; current GPS on map |
| **Failure States** | PARCEL_NOT_FOUND (tracking ref invalid), backend unavailable |
| **Security Validations** | No auth required; declared value NOT shown to public; audit trail hidden from non-staff |

---

### WF-14: Self-Healing Congestion Detection

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | ADMIN — `/admin/self-healing` |
| **Required Permissions** | ADMIN (via ProtectedWrapper) |
| **Involved Pages** | `SelfHealingDashboard` |
| **Involved APIs** | `GET /api/ai/agent/status`, `GET /api/ai/agent/agency/{id}/recommendation`, AI recommendation endpoints |
| **Expected Result** | Congestion detected → AI recommendation displayed → Admin approves/rejects → Action executed |
| **Failure States** | AI service unavailable, OpenAI API key missing, recommendation already applied |
| **Security Validations** | Only ADMIN can view self-healing dashboard; AI recommendations require ADMIN approval |

---

### WF-15: Offline Scan Sync (Planned)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Entry Point** | AGENT/COURIER — scan console (offline mode) |
| **Required Permissions** | Authenticated; `POST /api/sync/scan-events` |
| **Involved Pages** | ScanConsole (mobile), web useOfflineSync.ts hook |
| **Involved APIs** | `POST /api/scan-events` (online), `POST /api/sync/scan-events` (batch offline sync) |
| **Expected Result** | Scan events queued locally → synced when connectivity restored |
| **Failure States** | Duplicate sync (idempotency key required), connectivity never restored |
| **Security Validations** | Batch sync: same auth as individual scan events; idempotency key prevents duplicates |

---

## Role Transition Rules

| Transition | How | Who Can Do It |
|---|---|---|
| PUBLIC → CLIENT | Self-register with OTP | User themselves |
| CLIENT → (any role) | Not possible (CLIENT is immutable) | N/A |
| STAFF → ADMIN | PATCH /api/staff/{id}/role (role update) | ADMIN |
| STAFF → FINANCE | PATCH /api/staff/{id}/role | ADMIN |
| STAFF → RISK | PATCH /api/staff/{id}/role | ADMIN |
| any role → FROZEN | PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze | ADMIN or RISK |
| FROZEN → ACTIVE | PATCH /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze (frozen=false) | ADMIN or RISK |

---

## Security Validation Checklist

| Check | Endpoint | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|
| AUTH_REQUIRED | All `/api/**` except public routes | JwtAuthFilter — 401 if missing/invalid token |
| ROLE_CHECK | Admin endpoints | `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')")` |
| DATA_ISOLATION | `/api/parcels/me` | WHERE clause: parcel.client_id = authenticated user's entityId |
| AGENCY_SCOPE | Agent parcel queries | WHERE clause: agency_id = agent's agency |
| COURIER_SCOPE | `/api/pickups/courier/me` | WHERE clause: courier_id = authenticated courier's entityId |
| RATE_LIMIT | `/api/auth/**` | RateLimitFilter: 10 req/min auth, 60 req/min general |
| ACCOUNT_LOCK | Login | AccountLockoutService: 5 failures → 15 min lockout |
| ACCOUNT_FREEZE | All authenticated endpoints | JwtAuthFilter reads frozen flag (known gap: not checked per-request) |
| GPS_REQUIRED | `POST /api/scan-events` | NOT NULL constraints on latitude/longitude |
| OTP_SINGLE_USE | OTP verification | Atomic update: used=true after first verification |
| PARCEL_LOCK | Corrections after lock | `locked=true` blocks all modifications except admin override |
| WEBHOOK_AUTH | `POST /api/payments/mtn/**` | **KNOWN GAP**: no signature verification currently |

---

## API Reference Summary (All Authenticated Calls)

| Method | Path | Roles | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/auth/register | PUBLIC | Register client with OTP |
| POST | /api/auth/login | PUBLIC | Password login |
| POST | /api/auth/google | PUBLIC | Google OAuth login |
| POST | /api/auth/login/otp/request | PUBLIC | Request OTP for login |
| POST | /api/auth/login/otp/confirm | PUBLIC | Verify OTP, get JWT |
| POST | /api/auth/send-otp | PUBLIC | Send OTP (registration) |
| POST | /api/auth/verify-otp | PUBLIC | Verify generic OTP |
| POST | /api/auth/password/reset/request | PUBLIC | Request password reset |
| POST | /api/auth/password/reset/confirm | PUBLIC | Confirm password reset |
| GET | /api/track/{ref} | PUBLIC | Track parcel by reference |
| POST | /api/parcels | CLIENT | Create parcel |
| GET | /api/parcels/me | CLIENT | List own parcels |
| GET | /api/parcels | ADMIN,STAFF | List all parcels |
| GET | /api/parcels/{id} | AUTH | Get parcel detail |
| POST | /api/parcels/{id}/validate-and-lock | AGENT,COURIER,STAFF,ADMIN | Lock parcel |
| PATCH | /api/parcels/{id}/admin-override | ADMIN | Override locked parcel |
| POST | /api/scan-events | AGENT,COURIER,STAFF,ADMIN | Record scan event |
| GET | /api/scan-events/parcel/{id} | AUTH | Get parcel scan history |
| POST | /api/delivery/start | AUTH | Start delivery |
| POST | /api/delivery/otp/send | AUTH | Send delivery OTP |
| POST | /api/delivery/otp/verify | AUTH | Verify delivery OTP |
| POST | /api/delivery/complete | AUTH | Complete delivery |
| GET | /api/pickups/me | CLIENT | List own pickups |
| GET | /api/pickups/courier/me | COURIER | List courier's pickups |
| GET | /api/pickups | AUTH | List all pickups |
| POST | /api/pickups | AUTH | Create pickup request |
| POST | /api/pickups/{id}/assign-courier | AUTH | Assign courier to pickup |
| GET | /api/payments | AUTH | List payments |
| POST | /api/payments/init | AUTH | Initialize payment |
| GET | /api/finance/stats | ADMIN,FINANCE | Finance statistics |
| GET | /api/finance/refunds | ADMIN,FINANCE | List refunds |
| PATCH | /api/finance/refunds/{id}/status | ADMIN,FINANCE | Update refund status |
| GET | /api/risk/alerts | ADMIN,RISK | List risk alerts |
| POST | /api/risk | ADMIN,RISK | Create risk alert |
| PATCH | /api/risk/alerts/{id} | ADMIN,RISK | Update alert status |
| PATCH | /api/risk/users/{id}/freeze | ADMIN,RISK | Freeze user account |
| POST | /api/staff | ADMIN | Create staff/finance/risk |
| POST | /api/agents | ADMIN | Create agent |
| POST | /api/couriers | ADMIN | Create courier |
| GET | /api/admin/users | ADMIN | List all users |
| PATCH | /api/admin/users/{id}/freeze | ADMIN | Freeze/unfreeze account |
| CRUD | /api/tariffs | ADMIN,STAFF | Tariff management |
| CRUD | /api/agencies | ADMIN,STAFF | Agency management |
| GET | /api/dashboard/summary | AUTH | Dashboard stats |
| GET | /api/notifications/me | AUTH | My notifications |
| PUT | /api/notifications/{id}/read | AUTH | Mark notification read |
| GET | /api/invoices/me | CLIENT,ADMIN,FINANCE | My invoices |
| GET | /api/invoices/{id}/pdf | All roles | Download invoice PDF |
| POST | /api/ai/chat | AUTH | AI chatbot |
| GET | /api/ai/agent/status | AUTH | AI agent status |
| POST | /api/sync/scan-events | AUTH | Sync offline scan events |
